ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (e.g., BCYC) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market value of the company's outstanding shares */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Annual dividend per share divided by the stock price */,
  "beta" REAL /* Measure of the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume weighted average price of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trading data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the trading data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone where the exchange is located */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the exchange is open for trading */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tool */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of analysis tool (e.g., trend, volatility) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the tool information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the visualization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock or tool */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES analysis_tools ("tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
